reviews.review_description:
There are four modules of training and when you get finished, it does not go further to let you operate the crane, it stops there at the compound where the where the crane is sitting it only lets you climb on board the crane one time and that is to verify the load weight.￼ this 
should be clarified in the description .
I’ve purchased this and never been ever to simulate anything please refund my money!!!!

reviews.review_title: looks nice in the lab but...
reviews.review_description: Well, I never got a chance to play it, because the submit button doesn't work. Throw in the horrible motion sickness and you get... well, the second construction vehicle app with no real gameplay functionality.

It's interesting, I did all the training hoping to at least get to lift and move a few loads and perhaps move a load in a blind spot using a signaler.
Buttttt.....the motion sickness in this app needs fixing.  It's very hard to move around.

Fabulous learning experience I just want… no I just need more more information more tools more movement more equipment more details 

I always say to myself the more you know about something the less likely it is to kill you so this is my kinda learning application did I say I want more? Because I do don’t stop doing this 

Crain safety driving and operation management and maintenance did I say more please great work developers 😍
